text:
- Add QT frontend support
- Add support for Type1 fonts via T1 library
- Add NLS support (French localization)
- Fix GCC 4.1 compatiblity
- Fix comment
- Add OPTIONS
- Enable builds with optimized CFLAGS
- Fix patchname to make portlint happy
- Take maintainership
